exclusions.reason: Theory proposal paper — no experimental materials data. T1=3e9µs and T2=80000µs are theoretical estimates from noise model, not measurements. 'Harmonium' qubit has not been fabricated. C2QA acknowledgment caused false high-relevance classification.

NV center / FPGA control paper — not a superconducting materials paper. T1/T2 values are NV spin coherence times, not superconducting qubit coherence. No film, Tc, RRR, or Qi data. Known ingester leakage type: non-superconducting quantum systems with C2QA acknowledgment.

ZnO semiconductor donor spin qubit paper — not a superconducting materials paper. No Tc, RRR, Qi, or T1 data. C2QA acknowledgment covers only DFT calculations. Known ingester leakage type: non-superconducting quantum systems.
Microwave-to-optical transducer paper. No qubit coherence data. C2QA acknowledgment caused false high-relevance.
Pure theory paper — Space Curve Quantum Control applied to dual-rail erasure qubits. No experimental measurements.
Readout benchmarking methodology. Four samples are four readout durations on same qubit, not materials characterization. No T1/T2 as primary results.
Transition metal spin defects in AlN/GaN. Not a superconducting system. C2QA acknowledgment caused false high-relevance.
T and CN color centers in silicon. Not a superconducting system. C2QA acknowledgment caused false high-relevance.
NV centers in diamond. Not a superconducting system. C2QA acknowledgment caused false high-relevance.
SiV centers in diamond. Not a superconducting system. C2QA acknowledgment caused false high-relevance.
NV centers in bulk diamond. Not a superconducting system. C2QA acknowledgment caused false high-relevance.
Cr/Fe/V defect spins in HEMEX sapphire. Not a superconducting system. C2QA acknowledgment caused false high-relevance.
MoO3-hBN-Au nanocavity nanophotonics. Not a superconducting system.
Fabry-Perot cavity with photonic crystal mirrors. Photonics paper, not superconducting materials.
DL-OPO microring resonator — optical photonics. Not a superconducting system.
Linear quantum coupler — theoretical device proposal. No experimental measurements.
Surface code resource estimate. No materials characterization or qubit measurements.
